# FoundationDB client library — license notices

This directory holds the license notices for the FoundationDB C client library
(`libfdb_c`) that FlowG vendors under `third-party/foundationdb/7.3.77/lib` and
redistributes (via git, the release archives and the Docker image).

FoundationDB is licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.

| File               | Source                                                            |
| ------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `LICENSE`          | https://github.com/apple/foundationdb/blob/7.3.77/LICENSE        |
| `ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS` | https://github.com/apple/foundationdb/blob/7.3.77/ACKNOWLEDGEMENTS |

Both files are taken verbatim from the `7.3.77` tag — the exact version pinned by
FlowG (FoundationDB API version 730). When the pinned version changes, refresh
these files from the matching tag.
